overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru. Pressure points are tied to Shani and Rahu and Ketu and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: For the Karkataka Rashi (Cancer) natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results due to the benevolent influence of Jupiter throughout the period. Until May 31, 2026, you will be inclined toward significant charitable works and may utilize ancestral wealth for spiritual purposes, while from June 1st onward, Jupiter’s full favor will help you overcome negative habits, embrace a healthier lifestyle, and fulfill your desires for higher learning. This year is marked by a joyful and optimistic outlook, characterized by generosity, successful luxury travels, and divine grace that brings worldly comforts, particularly favoring women and those in leadership roles who will gain immense public support. Professionally, businesses involving liquids or home decor will flourish, your administrative capabilities will reach new heights, and those in the arts will see a surge in their creative skills, making this a transformative and highly profitable year for your Rashi.
opportunities: For the Karkataka Rashi (Cancer) natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results due to the benevolent influence of Jupiter throughout the period. This year is marked by a joyful and optimistic outlook, characterized by generosity, successful luxury travels, and divine grace that brings worldly comforts, particularly favoring women and those in leadership roles who will gain immense public support.
caution: For Karkataka Rashi natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year will bring unfavorable results due to the influence of Saturn throughout the year, particularly causing health and financial difficulties for paternal relatives. Those who are unmarried may face obstacles in their wedding prospects, while those constructing new homes might find their financial estimates overshooting and face significant delays in construction.

healthWellbeing: For Karkataka Rashi natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year will bring unfavorable results due to the influence of Saturn throughout the year, particularly causing health and financial difficulties for paternal relatives. For Karkataka Rashi natives, the influence of Ketu throughout the Sri Parabhava Naama year will also lead to unfavorable results, characterized by frequent wasteful expenditures and persistent health-related irritations.
blessing: Overall, for Karkataka Rashi natives during the Sri Parabhava Naama year, only the planet Jupiter remains favorable. In contrast, the placements of Saturn, Rahu, and Ketu are likely to bring various challenges and difficulties throughout the year.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For the Karkataka Rashi (Cancer) natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results due to the benevolent influence of Jupiter throughout the period. Until May 31, 2026, you will be inclined toward significant charitable works and may utilize ancestral wealth for spiritual purposes, while from June 1st onward, Jupiter’s full favor will help you overcome negative habits, embrace a healthier lifestyle, and fulfill your desires for higher learning. This year is marked by a joyful and optimistic outlook, characterized by generosity, successful luxury travels, and divine grace that brings worldly comforts, particularly favoring women and those in leadership roles who will gain immense public support. Professionally, businesses involving liquids or home decor will flourish, your administrative capabilities will reach new heights, and those in the arts will see a surge in their creative skills, making this a transformative and highly profitable year for your Rashi.

For Karkataka Rashi natives, the Sri Parabhava Naama year will bring unfavorable results due to the influence of Saturn throughout the year, particularly causing health and financial difficulties for paternal relatives. During this period, there may be an increase in the desire for sensory pleasures, and individuals may suffer from dental or abdominal-related ailments. Those who are unmarried may face obstacles in their wedding prospects, while those constructing new homes might find their financial estimates overshooting and face significant delays in construction. Those with Saturn in a negative position in their personal horoscopes may encounter various daily struggles; however, it is noted that Karkataka Rashi is not currently undergoing the Elinaati Shani (Sade Sati) phase. To mitigate these adverse effects,

For Karkataka Rashi natives, the influence of Rahu throughout the Sri Parabhava Naama year will present several challenging situations, including difficulties arising from enemies, health issues, and the burden of unnecessary debts. There are also indications of distress or sorrow within marital life. Those with severe Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal birth charts are cautioned about potential risks related to mental instability or chronic ailments like tuberculosis. To mitigate these adverse effects, it is recommended to donate a copper vessel or a copper idol of a serpent to a Brahmin. Additionally, chanting the Rahu Mantra once daily and frequently performing Rahu Graha Shanti Japa will help reduce these negative impacts.

For Karkataka Rashi natives, the influence of Ketu throughout the Sri Parabhava Naama year will also lead to unfavorable results, characterized by frequent wasteful expenditures and persistent health-related irritations. It is particularly important to remain vigilant regarding the health of children, and the period may also prove challenging for maternal relatives. There are indications that the youth might behave in a manner that could tarnish their family's reputation. After December 5, 2026, you may encounter a setback in your professional life, and a restless atmosphere may cause distress. To mitigate these effects, it is recommended to frequently donate horse gram (Ulavalu) to Brahmins and to daily chant the Ketu Mantra:

monthlyHighlights.summary: In March 2026, matters related to children may yield negative results, while professional and business affairs are expected to remain average. Financial income will be ordinary, but you may experience severe mental anxiety due to a new person entering your personal life. Unemployed individuals might also face unfavorable outcomes as expected job opportunities could slip away at the last moment. You may encounter difficulties due to the "evil eye" (Nara Ghosha), making it advisable to practice soft speech and avoid taking any adventurous or risky decisions this month. It is better to handle every task personally and remain conciliatory in disputes to ensure a smoother period.

This month will be highly encouraging for starting new ventures, with chemical-related businesses specifically seeing significant profits while other trades progress as expected. Professionally, you will achieve victory over rivals, and court verdicts are likely to be in your favor. While financial income remains strong and bank-related debt issues are resolved, it is advisable to avoid financial partnerships with friends during this period. You should be cautious of impulsive speech to avoid later regret, though your talents will receive due recognition by the final week, along with support and encouragement from superiors at the workplace. It is important to cultivate the habit of valuing others' advice, and you should remain alert regarding potential knee-related health issues, noting that those born under the Pushyami nakshatra will receive honors and awards during the second half of the month.

Financial income will remain strong this month, with favorable results continuing for those in business, employment, and professional sectors. Pending funds will reach you on time, and an increase in concentration will allow you to enjoy happy, fulfilling days in both personal and marital life. This month brings auspicious news for the unmarried and the unemployed, as tasks will be completed on schedule and you will remain steady even in the face of unstable conditions. Your personal reputation and prestige will grow, previously stalled projects will be restarted, and you will make firm decisions by carefully weighing the pros and cons of every situation. While you engage in activities that earn everyone's appreciation, you must be prepared for sudden changes in your professional life. Finally, you will resolve financial disputes among family members and provide the necessary support to help your siblings become self-reliant.

Financial income will see a slight decrease this month, though planetary alignments are favorable for those aspiring to have children. All types of businesses will continue at a moderate pace, but this is not an auspicious time to enter into new partnership ventures. You should remain cautious regarding stomach-related health issues that may cause distress. During the third week, those born under the Punarvasu nakshatra may face situations leading to a lack of mental peace in their careers, alongside a decline in executive skills and a lack of cooperation from subordinate staff. While you will manage to escape from potential accidents this month, conditions will become somewhat more favorable toward the month's end; however, please note that the 7th, 12th, 15th, 23rd, and 28th are not favorable dates.

This month, you will experience a swiftness in your thoughts, but that same speed may be lacking when it comes to practical execution, making focused planning essential. You might find yourself hesitating or stepping back during moments that require determined action, and it is advisable to avoid taking unilateral decisions within the family. It is important to recognize the hard work of others and behave accordingly, as you may need to consult with elders or experienced individuals for guidance. Financial income will be strong, allowing you to overcome all economic difficulties and take on new responsibilities. While interest in spiritual matters increases, those born under the Ashlesha nakshatra will see an improvement in their eloquence and communication skills, and individuals in the field of sports will achieve significant success this month.

This month, you may face situations where family members question your personality, and the arrival of new individuals in the family could lead to ego-related conflicts. You will learn to adapt your mindset according to these evolving circumstances, but it is essential to remain cautious of colleagues at the workplace who may harbor negative feelings toward you. Avoid displaying excessive kindness or mercy, as it could unintentionally invite trouble. While financial income remains average and the business sector sees a decline in expected profits, marriage proposals initiated in the second half of the month, specifically after the 16th, are likely to be successful. Finally, those traveling by water should be extremely careful, and it is advisable to postpone water-based journeys or adventurous activities whenever possible.

This month, previously disrupted business affairs will return to the right track, and it will be a favorable period for those seeking government jobs or transitions in their professional lives. Long-standing efforts to acquire a dream home are likely to reach a conclusion, and the timing is also auspicious for purchasing new vehicles or attaining new positions of authority. While financial income remains average, women should be cautious regarding potential stomach-related health issues. You may face some anxiety concerning your children on the 19th, 20th, and 21st, and the final week of the month might require long-distance travel to attend to matters involving close relatives.

This month may not be favorable for the health of maternal relatives, and both business affairs and financial income are expected to remain average. You might experience slight unrest and a decrease in comfort in your personal life, and it is wise to be cautious as associations with certain individuals could lead to complications. Between the 11th and the 20th, your efforts to find new sources of income will bear fruit, and you will be able to complete tasks that were previously postponed. Physical exhaustion will increase during the final week, and the 25th, 26th, 27th, and 28th are not favorable dates. Due to the significant negative influence of Saturn (Shani) this month, it is recommended to perform Tailabhishekam to Lord Shaneswara on a Saturday and regularly chant the Shani Graha Stotram for relief.

This month, you will receive the divine blessings of your favored deity and will be able to complete your tasks through your own self-effort. You will enjoy comfort and happiness by receiving the expected support from your spouse, and your ability to finish a difficult task will draw positive attention from everyone. Desired changes in your professional life will manifest, leading to honors and respect within society, and you will successfully organize auspicious family events. However, the month may yield disappointing results for those in the legal profession and for individuals seeking foreign citizenship.

In this month, your financial growth will gradually decline, and you will encounter unexpected irritations in business matters. Luck may not be on your side as excellent opportunities are likely to slip away at the last moment, forcing you to seek the assistance of others to resolve your problems. Farmers may face issues regarding land boundaries, and there is a tendency to purchase unnecessary items simply to impress others. The final week of the month will bring a period of high physical strain and hard work, and any new ventures initiated during this time are unlikely to yield success. You will find it necessary to rely on the support of old friends, and through these experiences, you will gain valuable new insights and wisdom.

This month, the pace of your personal and professional growth will continue to slow down, and you may encounter situations that cause a sense of restlessness or dissatisfaction in your daily life. Financial income will not be very encouraging, so any attempts at starting new ventures or expanding existing businesses should be implemented before the 17th of the month. It is essential to remain cautious regarding new agreements, as differences of opinion may arise among friends. Additionally, your health may not be very supportive during this period, leading to medical expenses that could cause your total expenditures to exceed your income by the end of the month, potentially requiring you to take out loans.

Wastage of money and unnecessary expenditures will continue this month, preventing your financial plans from progressing as intended. In addition to these economic challenges, health issues may cause further distress, and you might face instances of betrayal by those close to you. It is advisable to avoid giving guarantees or sureties for others and to refrain from engaging in real estate transactions involving the purchase or sale of land. Matters related to house construction will likely involve excessive costs and significant strain, and there is a risk of losing a valuable item or an important document. You may also experience issues related to memory or forgetfulness; therefore, please note that the 8th, 10th, 14th, 16th, 20th, and 21st of this month are not favorable dates.

This month, financial income will remain average, but you may face situations where the actions of grown children lead to a loss of respect in society. Resolving domestic problems will prove difficult, and it is advisable to make necessary changes to your dietary habits to maintain well-being. While you may encounter some challenges related to government matters, your worries regarding family lineage and progeny will be resolved through the blessings of Jupiter (Guru). It is important to exercise patience during small conversations, as being stubborn or over-insistent can lead to unnecessary trouble. Finally, you will find yourself engaging in scientific discussions and developing a keen interest in the wonders of nature.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
